overview.description: Walmart Inc. engages in the operation of retail and wholesale stores and clubs, ecommerce websites, and mobile applications worldwide. The company operates through three segments: Walmart U.S., Walmart International, and Sam's Club U.S. It operates supercenters, supermarkets, warehouse clubs, cash and carry stores, and discount stores under Walmart and Walmart Neighborhood Market brands; membership-only warehouse clubs; and ecommerce websites, such as walmart.com.mx, walmart.ca, flipkart.com, PhonePe and other sites. It offers grocery items, in...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2026, Walmart's revenue was $713.16 billion, an increase of 4.73% compared to the previous year's $680.99 billion. Earnings were $21.89 billion, an increase of 12.64%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 43 analysts, the average rating for WMT stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $138.37, which is an increase of 17.13% from the latest price.

data.title: Walmart and Amazon Face Backlash from LGBTQ+ Shoppers Over DEI Dilution
data.text: Retail giant Walmart ($WMT) and e-commerce rival Amazon ($AMZN) have both been hit by a drop-off in spending by LGBTQ+ customers because of a backlash against their diluted DEI policies.

data.title: Amazon, Walmart and Target Clash in June Sales Events
data.text: June will be a big month for omnichannel retailer promotions. Amazon, Walmart, Target, Kohl's and Staples have each announced sales events that begin this month and overlap or partially overlap.

data.title: Walmart's AI-powered warehouses are slashing the time it takes store employees to unload trucks
data.text: Walmart's investments in physical AI are paying off in terms of raw speed. The retailer's automated distribution network is better at organizing freight for faster unloading.

data.title: Walmart Transcript: The 6th Annual Evercore Consumer & Retail Conference
data.text: The conference highlighted a multi-pronged growth strategy focused on expanding marketplace, advertising, and membership businesses globally, with technology and AI playing key roles in enhancing customer experience and operational efficiency. Emphasis was placed on global platform scalability, fast delivery, and leveraging data for personalization.

data.title: Walmart Transcript: Oppenheimer 26th Annual Consumer Growth and E-Commerce Conference
data.text: Strong Q1 results were driven by omnichannel growth, e-commerce momentum, and expanding membership. Investments in automation, AI, and marketplace expansion are fueling efficiency and engagement, while new perks and services enhance customer value. Significant growth opportunities remain.
